name: Hero Parallax
summary: A dynamic parallax hero featuring multiple rows of product images that scroll horizontally at different speeds, creating a 3D depth effect with smooth spring physics animations.
detailedDescription: The Hero Parallax component creates a stunning hero section where product images scroll horizontally in multiple rows as users scroll vertically. Each row moves at a different speed and direction - some rows scroll left while others scroll right - creating a convincing parallax depth effect. The component uses Framer Motion's spring physics for smooth, natural motion that feels weighty and responsive. As users scroll, the entire hero section also rotates slightly on X and Z axes, adding to the 3D illusion. The opacity fades in smoothly as scrolling begins, creating a polished entrance effect. Products are arranged in rows of 5, with automatic slicing of the product array. Perfect for showcasing product catalogs, portfolio work, client logos, or any image collection where dynamic movement enhances visual appeal. The effect creates immediate visual interest and encourages users to scroll and explore the full animation sequence.
purpose: Create dynamic parallax hero with multi-directional scrolling
Showcase product collections with engaging motion
Add 3D depth through varied scroll speeds and rotations
Encourage scrolling exploration through rewarding animation
Present image collections in memorable, dynamic format
behavior: Arranges products in multiple horizontal scrolling rows
Scrolls rows at different speeds and directions
Applies spring physics for smooth, natural motion
Rotates hero section on X and Z axes during scroll
Fades in opacity smoothly as scroll begins
Tracks scroll progress with motion values
Automatically slices products into rows of 5
visualCharacteristics: Multiple rows of images scrolling in opposite directions
3D parallax depth effect from varied scroll speeds
Smooth spring-based motion feeling natural and weighty
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
